name: The National Electric Code
effect: Cite an authoritative external standard to govern all electrical decisions. This card is considered non-negotiable.

clauses.name: JURISDICTION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If a dispute arises: The Code is invoked and the dispute is considered resolved.

clauses.name: AMENDMENT OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the Code has been updated since implementation: The older version is considered still in effect by the team that built it.

clauses.name: INTERPRETATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: When two licensed professionals disagree: Both are considered correct until an inspector arrives.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Which edition are we actually following?
